history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. The direct path forward leads to row 02 columns C and D which are free. However, moving forward then moving down avoids lava at column C row 03 and 04. I will move forward to get closer.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward will lead me to row 02 column D which is a safe floor cell (`.`). I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column D, facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04, column D. The path forward (row 03, column D) is safe (floor), so I will move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward from here leads to row 02 column E, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward safely. I need to turn to face downwards (`v`) to move closer to the goal. To turn from right (`>`) to down (`v`), I will TURN_RIGHT.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 02, column D, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04, column D, and the cell ahead (row 03, column D) is floor (`.`) and safe. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, column D facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 4, column D, directly in front of me. Moving forward will take me to the goal cell safely as the cell below is `G` (goal), not lava or wall.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
